name: Moonleaf
description: A soft silver-green leaf that curls toward moonlight.

name: Forest Water
description: Clear spring water gathered from a shaded forest pool.

name: Dewcap Mushroom
description: A small blue mushroom that drinks morning mist through its cap.

name: Glowberry
description: A warm little berry with a pulse of gentle plant magic.

name: Calming Tea
description: A gentle herbal tea that settles nerves and softens the edge of a difficult day.

name: Root-Wake Tonic
description: A mild tonic for young roots that need a little magical encouragement.

name: Moonleaf Seed Packet
description: A small paper packet of moonleaf seeds from Sage. They are a promise for later.
